modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in bullet points and use a warm and approachable tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be a few minor typos and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Need help getting started with Google Drive setup.

full_description_text:
- I'm trying to figure out how to start using Google Drive.  
- I’m not sure what the first steps are or how to set it up properly.  
- Any guidance on this would be really appreciated!
short_description: Need help getting started with Google Drive setup.
description:
